zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Agnes "Elizabeth" Pickworth於1499年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾霍爾布林時，她的父親William Pykeworth26歲，母親Anne Halsam24歲。她於1518年與Willam Jackson在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾霍爾布林結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1569年8月4日在她的家鄉享年70歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾霍爾布林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Agnes "Elizabeth" Pickworth于1499年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾霍爾布林时，她的父亲William Pykeworth26岁，母亲Anne Halsam24岁。她于1518年与Willam Jackson在英国英格兰林可爾史爾霍爾布林结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1569年8月4日在她的家乡享年70岁，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾霍爾布林。

nameMeanings.name: Pickworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from either of two places called Pickworth, in Lincolnshire and Rutland. The placenames derive from an Old English personal name Pīca + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

nameMeanings.name: "Elizabeth"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Agnes "Elizabeth" Pickworth was born in 1499, in Horbling, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Pykeworth, was 26 and her mother, Anne Halsam, was 24. She married Willam Jackson in 1518, in Horbling, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 4 August 1569, in her hometown, at the age of 70, and was buried in Horbling, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Agnes "Elizabeth" Pickworth est née en 1499, à Horbling, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Pykeworth, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Anne Halsam, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Willam Jackson en 1518, à Horbling, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 4 août 1569, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à Horbling, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Agnes "Elizabeth" Pickworth 1499 in Horbling, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Pykeworth 26 und ihre Mutter Anne Halsam 24. Sie hat 1518 in Horbling, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Willam Jackson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 4. August 1569 im Alter von 70 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Horbling, Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Agnes "Elizabeth" Pickworth è nata il nel 1499 nel Horbling, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William Pykeworth, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Anne Halsam, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Willam Jackson nel 1518, nel Horbling, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 4 agosto 1569, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolta a Horbling, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Agnes "Elizabeth" Pickworthが1499年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアホールブリングで生まれた時，父William Pykeworthは26歳，母Anne Halsamは24歳であった。1518年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアホールブリングでWillam Jacksonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1569年8月4日に故郷で70歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアホールブリングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Agnes "Elizabeth" Pickworth(이)가 1499년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 호르블링에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Pykeworth(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Halsam(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1518년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 호르블링에서 Willam Jackson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1569년 8월 4일 그녀의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 호르블링에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Agnes "Elizabeth" Pickworth nasceu em 1499, em Horbling, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Pykeworth, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Anne Halsam, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Willam Jackson em 1518, em Horbling, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 4 de agosto de 1569, em sua cidade natal, com 70 anos, e foi sepultada em Horbling, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Agnes "Elizabeth" Pickworth родилась в 1499 г. в местности хаурблинг, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Pykeworth было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Halsam, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Willam Jackson в 1518 г. в местности хаурблинг, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 4 августа 1569 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности хаурблинг, линколншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Agnes "Elizabeth" Pickworth nació en 1499, en Horbling, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Pykeworth, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Anne Halsam, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Willam Jackson en 1518, en Horbling, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 4 de agosto de 1569, en su pueblo, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultada en Horbling, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
